/usr/lib64/ccache/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/calculator.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/calculator.dir/firmware/main_host.cpp.o CMakeFiles/calculator.dir/firmware/hal/host/display_sdl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/calculator.dir/firmware/hal/host/keypad_host.cpp.o -o calculator  /usr/lib64/libSDL2-2.0.so.0.3200.64
